testcases.description: Gateway shall enable ACC rail once auxiliary ignition and battery qualifiers hold with debouncing.
testcases.given: IGN_AUX true and BATT_VOLTAGE stays above nine volts with fifty millisecond debounce on Gateway ECU power manager firmware.
testcases.expectation: ACC rail allowance flag asserts once without chatter until inputs drop.

testcases.description: Accessory retention collapses immediately after driver door opens post engine stop.
testcases.given: ENGINE_STATE equals OFF followed by DRIVER_DOOR transitions to OPEN on BCM retention build.
testcases.expectation: Retention window clears and orderly accessory shutdown sequencing begins.

testcases.description: Network coordinator defers cooperative sleep whenever any awake client bitmask bit remains asserted.
testcases.given: AWAKE_CLIENT_BITMAP remains non-zero indicating pending clients still active.
testcases.expectation: Sleep negotiation state machine postpones transitions until bitmask clears.
